name: Boston Cream Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, thick cream, and Karo syrup in a saucepan.
2. Heat over medium until it reaches the soft-ball stage (235°F on an instant-read thermometer).
3. Remove from heat and let cool for about 10 minutes.
4. Stir in the chopped walnuts and maraschino cherries.
5. Pour the batter into two buttered, 8-inch square pans.
6. Allow to cool completely in the refrigerator.
7. Cut into small squares.
Makes 2 to 3 dozen squares.
